data.title: feat(cli): indicate remaining unread messages in inbox output
data.description:
When inbox has more messages than the limit shows, output now includes:
- has_more: boolean indicating more messages exist  
- remaining_unread: count of messages not shown
- advice: the exact command to run again to see more

Works across all output formats (JSON, TOON, Text).

Changes:
- Added total_available field to HistoryOutput to track count before limit
- Added has_more, remaining_unread, advice fields to InboxOutput
- Updated JSON, TOON, and Text formatters to display pagination info
- Added build_advice_command helper to reconstruct original command

Closes bd-28p9

data.reason: Security review: No issues found. Changes add pagination metadata (has_more, remaining_unread, advice) as display-only output. No command injection risk - advice is displayed text, not executed. Path traversal blocked by channel_path() sanitization. No secrets, DoS vectors, or overflow risks.
